name: Cryptohopper
description_short: Cloud-based crypto trading bot with strategy marketplace, backtesting, paper trading, and AI-powered strategy design.
description_long:
Cryptohopper is a cloud-based crypto trading bot platform that runs 24/7 without needing to keep your computer on. The platform offers a wide range of bot configurations from simple DCA strategies to complex AI-designed trading systems, making it accessible to both beginners and advanced traders.

The Strategy Marketplace is Cryptohopper's standout feature, allowing users to buy and sell proven trading strategies, signals, and templates. This marketplace model lets successful traders monetize their strategies while giving newer traders access to battle-tested configurations.

The AI Strategy Designer on the Hero plan uses machine learning to create optimized trading strategies based on historical data. Combined with comprehensive backtesting and paper trading capabilities, traders can thoroughly validate strategies before deploying real capital. Plans range from Free (Pioneer) to Hero at $107.50/month with annual billing.
pros: AI Strategy Designer for automated optimization
cons: Can be complex for complete beginners
